fields.name: vendorCode
fields.description: card vendor code, e.g VI – VISA, CA – MasterCard, AX – American Express etc

fields.name: expiryDate
fields.description: card expiry date in format MMYY, e.g. 0237 for February 2037

fields.name: cvv
fields.description: cerification calue number, as indicated on the credit card. Only for query
